'''Gundar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] who served [[Aryn Dro Thul]] aboard the ''[[Tradewyn]]'' following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'s end.

{{Char-stub}}
